name: Chocolate Chip Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Finely crushed creme-filled chocolate sandwich cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees.
2. Combine crumbs and margarine; press firmly on the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat cheese until fluffy.
4. Gradually beat in sweetened condensed milk until smooth.
5. Beat in eggs and vanilla extract.
6. Toss half cup chocolate chips with flour; stir into cheese mixture.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Top with remaining chips.
9. Bake for 55 minutes or until center is set.
10. Cool and chill. Refrigerate leftovers.
